title: Ash's Client for Hypixel Skyblock
description: A modpack centered around optimization and utility features for players of Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
This is just a little optimization modpack I made for myself playing Hypixel Skyblock. Contains everything you need to fine-tune your own client to work exactly like you want it to, but it'll run just fine without any tweaking too. 

Main Features:
- Heavy Optimization (Sodium, Lithium, culling mods, more...)
- Comes with the most popular Skyblock QOL/Utility mods for 1.21.1, no need to go looking.
- Contains Hypixel+ and an ore visibility resource pack out of the box, you just have to go turn them on in the Resource Packs menu.
- Highly configurable user settings, most configs and options can be changed through an in-game menu.

Updates are somewhat unlikely, but it should be easy to change whatever you need to.
